title: How To Train Your Dragon!
description: Adds How To Train Your Dragon to Minecraft! Known as one of the best Modpacks for HTTYD!
body:
Fly high with the ultimate HTTYD experience! 🐉 This Modrinth pack brings the Hidden World to your doorstep with rideable dragons, legendary Viking weaponry, and massive custom structures. Explore, tame, and master the skies in a whole new realm!
                   [Discord Support Server!](https://discord.gg/XQvWF85ess)
